title_en: MD & PhD · Professor · Chief Physician · Lab Leader, AI4Rad Lab
title_cn: MD & PhD · 教授 · 主任医师 · AI4Rad 实验室负责人
bio_en: Yuehua Li (MD & PhD, Professor, Chief Physician) leads AI4Rad Lab. He is Vice President of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital, Executive Director of the Institute of Medical Imaging, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, and a radiologist at the hospital's Department of Radiology, SJTU School of Medicine. His research centers on vascular and stroke imaging, cardiac and coronary CT, and the clinical translation of AI across radiology — from vessel segmentation and perfusion analysis to large-scale disease diagnosis and automated reporting.
bio_cn: 李跃华，MD & PhD、教授、主任医师，AI4Rad 实验室负责人。现任上海市第六人民医院副院长、上海交通大学影像医学研究所执行所长，上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院放射介入科医师。研究方向涵盖血管与卒中影像、心脏与冠脉 CT，以及人工智能在放射领域的临床转化——从血管分割、灌注分析到大规模疾病诊断与报告自动生成。
interests_en: Vascular & Stroke Imaging — CT/MR angiography, perfusion, thrombus characterization
Cardiac & Coronary CT — CT-FFR, myocardial perfusion, plaque analysis
AI-assisted Diagnosis & Reporting — detection, segmentation, structured reporting
Clinical Translation — multicenter validation of medical AI
interests_cn: 血管与卒中影像 — CT/MR 血管成像、灌注、血栓表征
心脏与冠脉 CT — CT-FFR、心肌灌注、斑块分析
AI 辅助诊断与报告 — 检测、分割、结构化报告
临床转化 — 医学 AI 的多中心验证
